extensionDescription.message: Extracts, cleans, and formats relevant links from the active page for your AI assistants.

toggleContentMode.description: Label for the main content mode

checkboxSelectAll.description: Option to select or deselect all links

noLinksFound.message: No links found in this mode.
noLinksFound.description: Message when no links are found

fallbackSuggestion.message: Switch to 'Full' mode to see all links on the page.
fallbackSuggestion.description: Fallback suggestion if content links list is empty

pageNotSupported.description: Error message when page (PDF, Reader Mode, etc.) is not supported

searchLabel.description: Accessible label for the search input

clearSearchLabel.description: Accessible label for clearing the search input

warningLimitExceeded.message: Only the first 200 links are displayed. The export will contain all links.
warningLimitExceeded.description: Warning when link count exceeds the display limit
